message:
feat(cli): add wa undo subcommand for reversing supported actions

Implement three operating modes for the new wa undo subcommand:

- --list: enumerate currently undoable actions with json/plain/auto
  output, filtering out already-undone entries, with --limit support
- <action-id>: undo a single action with interactive confirmation
  prompt (skip with --yes); non-interactive stdin without --yes is
  rejected with explicit error
- --all-in-workflow <id>: undo all undoable actions belonging to a
  workflow execution, processed newest-first for deterministic ordering

Exactly-one-mode mutual exclusion enforced between --list, action_id,
and --all-in-workflow. JSON output follows the project's {"ok": true,
"data": {...}, "version": "..."} envelope convention. Each execution
result is captured as UndoExecutionResult; errors are wrapped into
UndoOutcome::Failed rather than aborting the loop.

Closes wa-nu4.3.2.14

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
